title: Joe Biden triumphs in Nebraska's Democratic primary
shortDescription: Joe Biden won Nebraska's 2024 Democratic primary, securing the win with significant competition.

title: State election gets confusing: Two identically-named candidates withdraw from race in WA

title: Photo of trashed parking lot is from 2020 Trump rally | Fact check
shortDescription: The photo was included in news reports from January 2020 and shows a trashed parking lot after Trump's rally at the Wildwoods Convention Center.

title: Rep. Jamie Raskin asks oil companies about meeting with Trump
shortDescription: Rep. Jamie Raskin sent letters to nine oil companies about Trump's alleged request that the industry spend $1 billion on his campaign's behalf.

title: Kari Lake: Arizona Republican Senate candidate
shortDescription:
Former news anchor Kari Lake 
is the 2024 Republican Senate candidate from Arizona. In 2022, she lost the Arizona race for Governor.

title: Biden announces new Chinese tariffs

title: Donald Trump gag order upheld on appeal in New York hush money trial
shortDescription: A New York appellate court upheld Donald Trump's gag order, which prevents him from commenting on witnesses or jurors in his hush money trial.
